name: io.vestream/mcp
description: Real-time token vesting data for AI agents. Query wallet vestings, upcoming token unlocks, individual stream details, and manage unlock webhooks across 9 vesting protocols (Sablier, Hedgey, UNCX, Unvest, Team Finance, Superfluid, PinkSale, Streamflow, Jupiter Lock) on 5 chains (Ethereum, BNB Chain, Polygon, Base, Solana).

environment_variables.name: VESTREAM_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Your Vestream API key — get one at vestream.io/developer
